prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your digital detox forward
items: Track your current device usage for 3 days using built-in screen time tools
Create a physical device-free zone in your home
Identify and write down your top 3 digital triggers and their underlying needs
Set up analog alternatives for your most-used digital functions
Download and configure notification management apps or built-in focus modes
